title: 2-way Syncronization with a Spreadsheet🔄

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello, #monday champions,

No more manual board updates! We’re excited to announce a game-changer for your workflow: two-way board sync with Smart Spreadsheet!

This powerful feature lets you seamlessly update your board directly from a spreadsheet, eliminating tedious manual syncing.

Here’s the magic:

  • Effortless Updates: Edit your board directly from the spreadsheet – no more switching between views!
  • Data Consistency Guaranteed: Ensure both your board and spreadsheet always reflect the latest information.
  • Minimize Errors, Maximize Time: Eliminate the risk of manual errors and save precious time managing your data.

Component 122452560×1440 384 KB

Ready to supercharge your board with spreadsheet features? Give

> Smart Spreadsheet a try!
Read more about the new feature in he app’s documentation.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone!

We’re excited to share an update on two-way board sync with Smart Spreadsheet! You can now add calculation results directly to your board using the Bound Column to Board feature. Give it a try!

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
New Feature from Smart Spreadsheet for monday: local backups for ultimate data protection🔒.
Unlike anything offered by competitors, this feature ensures your data stays safe and recoverable, even in unexpected situations. Here’s how it works:
Automated integrity checks – detect any inconsistencies in your spreadsheet.
Local backups stored in your browser – keeping your data secure.
Restore previous versions if needed, ensuring you never lose critical information.

While this feature runs silently in the background, if an issue ever arises, we’ll be able to restore your data.

This update also brings us closer to exciting features soon!

We’re committed to stability, reliability, and the best experience for our users.
Reach out to our team with any questions.

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

Irina at Smart Spreadsheet for monday.com team is here to update you that we’ve just launched a new feature — Scheduled Reports .

You can now schedule and send selected Smart Spreadsheet views as XLS files — straight to your inbox.

It’s perfect for:

  • Sending regular spreadsheet reports to clients or teammates outside monday.com
  • Keeping a snapshot of your board on a specific date

How to set it up:
Go to the Automation Center → search for Smart Spreadsheet → choose the automation recipe and customize it to your needs.

Give it a try — and let us know what you think!

Warm Regards,
Smart Spreadsheet team

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone,

Just a quick update — Smart Spreadsheet now supports the Dropdown column with two-way synchronization and the Mirror date columns .

We’re working behind the scenes to make the app more useful.
